## Which part of Sockt does this affect

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Orchestrator (`@sockt/orch`) / task API
- [ ] Runtime / agent execution loop (`@sockt/runtime`)
- [ ] Built-in tools (`web_search`, `exec_code`, etc.)
- [ ] Departments / skills
- [ ] Memory pipeline (`@sockt/cadvp`, `@sockt/gbrain-mcp`)
- [ ] Rust CLI (`sockt`)
- [ ] UI dashboard (`@sockt/ui`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:
